caption: A person wearing a dark shirt is seen from behind, positioned within a cresting ocean wave. Overlaid on the churning blue water is white text that reads "the Tiger Technicians Hour with Basil Chapman | 877 927 6648". As the scene progresses, a white, page-like graphic curls and sweeps across the screen, partially obscuring the water. This white element transforms into a stylized digital page that reveals a photo of a person's face and further text. The text on this page identifies the program as "Tiger Technicians Hour with host: Basil Chapman," and notes he is the "Author of: CD book 'The Chapman Wave' and the Opening Call newsletter". At the bottom of the screen, a logo for "TFNN.com" appears above the phrase "EDUCATING INVESTORS".
